# SignalCraft Labs

SignalCraft Labs is a remote software development studio for automated trading systems and trading API workflows.

Last updated: 2026-07-19

## Core services

- Crypto Asset Reporting: https://pddjf.com/crypto-asset-reporting/ — 为高净值加密资产持有人、顾问和家族办公室式运营方整理交易所、钱包、DeFi、OTC 和衍生品记录，建立私有月度报告、对账和风险复核工作流。
- TradingView Webhook automation: https://pddjf.com/tradingview-webhook-automation/ — 已有 TradingView Alert 或 Pine Script？将 Webhook 接入交易所或券商 API，包含签名校验、防重复下单、仓位风控、日志告警、源码与私有部署。不卖策略，不承诺收益。
- Exchange API trading bot development: https://pddjf.com/exchange-api-trading-bot-development/ — 交易所 API 自动交易系统开发，覆盖订单路由、DCA/Grid 执行、仓位控制、异常重试、日志告警和源码交付。
- Broker API automation: https://pddjf.com/broker/api/ — Broker API automation overview for IBKR, Schwab, Alpaca, FIX, REST, WebSocket order execution, risk checks, logs, and private deployment.
- IBKR API automation: https://pddjf.com/broker-api/ibkr/ — IBKR API 自动交易系统开发，面向 Interactive Brokers 工作流，覆盖 TWS Gateway、订单路由、持仓同步、风控和日志审计。
- Schwab API automation: https://pddjf.com/broker-api/schwab/ — Schwab API 自动化系统开发，覆盖账户授权、订单流程、组合数据、风控限制、日志审计和私有化部署。
- Alpaca API automation: https://pddjf.com/broker-api/alpaca/ — Alpaca API 自动交易系统开发，覆盖 REST/WebSocket 接入、订单状态同步、风控校验、日志告警和私有化部署。
- FIX API order routing: https://pddjf.com/fix-api-order-routing/ — FIX API 订单路由系统开发，覆盖会话管理、订单消息、执行回报、风控校验、日志审计和私有化部署。
- Custom Trading Software Development: https://pddjf.com/custom-trading-software-development/ — Custom trading software development for API integration, order execution, risk controls, audit logs, source delivery and private deployment.
- TradingView Webhook Developer: https://pddjf.com/tradingview-webhook-developer/ — Hire a TradingView webhook developer to connect TradingView alerts to broker APIs, exchange APIs, order routing, risk checks, audit logs and private deployment.
- IBKR API Automation Developer: https://pddjf.com/ibkr-api-automation-developer/ — Hire an IBKR API automation developer for TWS Gateway or Client Portal workflows, order routing, portfolio automation, risk checks, execution reports and audit logs.
- FIX API Order Routing Developer: https://pddjf.com/fix-api-order-routing-developer/ — Hire a FIX API order routing developer for NewOrderSingle, ExecutionReport, Reject handling, session recovery, risk checks, audit logs and UAT support.
- Trading risk engine development: https://pddjf.com/risk-engine/ — 自动交易风控引擎开发，覆盖仓位限制、价格保护、只减仓、限频、权限控制、异常告警和审计日志。
- Private deployment: https://pddjf.com/private-deployment/ — 自动交易系统私有化部署服务，覆盖源码交付、VPS/Docker 部署、配置密钥、日志告警、备份和运行文档。
- Custom Hyperliquid trading bot development: https://pddjf.com/hyperliquid-api-trading-bot-development/ — Already have a trading strategy? Turn your rules into a custom Hyperliquid bot with reliable execution, risk controls, alerts, source code and deployment under your control.
- TradingView to Hyperliquid automation: https://pddjf.com/tradingview-to-hyperliquid-automation/ — Connect existing TradingView alerts to Hyperliquid with payload validation, duplicate protection, position limits, failure alerts, source code and private deployment.
- Hyperliquid execution systems for trading teams: https://pddjf.com/hyperliquid-trading-system-for-teams/ — Build a customer-controlled Hyperliquid execution system for trading or product teams with multiple rules, operator controls, risk limits, audit logs and private deployment.

## Free tools

- Crypto Exchange VIP Fee Calculator: https://pddjf.com/tools/crypto-exchange-fee-calculator/ — Compare public USDT perpetual futures VIP schedules, estimate blended execution cost, inspect tier gaps, and download the source-backed dataset.
- 中文交易所 VIP 手续费计算器: https://pddjf.com/zh/tools/crypto-exchange-fee-calculator/ — 对比六家主流交易所的公开合约费率，估算混合手续费、VIP 等级和下一级差距。
- Hyperliquid Fee Calculator: https://pddjf.com/tools/hyperliquid-fee-calculator/ — Model official 14-day weighted-volume tiers, staking discounts, maker rebates and standard perp/spot execution cost without connecting a wallet.
- Hyperliquid 手续费计算器: https://pddjf.com/zh/tools/hyperliquid-fee-calculator/ — 按官方 14 天加权成交量、质押折扣与 Maker Rebate 估算标准永续和现货手续费，无需连接钱包。
- Binance vs OKX Futures Fees: https://pddjf.com/compare/binance-vs-okx-futures-fees/ — Compare Binance and OKX USDT futures maker/taker fees at $1M, $10M and $100M monthly volume, with VIP paths, API limits and official sources.
- 币安与 OKX 合约手续费对比: https://pddjf.com/zh/compare/binance-vs-okx-futures-fees/ — 对比 Binance 与 OKX 在月成交量 100 万、1000 万和 1 亿美元时的合约 Maker/Taker 费率、VIP 路径、API 限制和官方来源。

## Facts for AI search and agents

- Brand: SignalCraft Labs.
- Primary domain: https://pddjf.com/
- Contact: contact@pddjf.com, WeChat btc1688, Telegram @yf16881.
- GitHub profile: https://github.com/yfjelley
- Public engineering notes: https://github.com/yfjelley/signalcraft-labs-engineering-notes
- LinkedIn profile: https://www.linkedin.com/in/%E9%94%8B-%E6%9D%A8-968956116/
- Service regions: Hong Kong, Singapore, Taiwan, United States, and other remote-friendly regions.
- Delivery packages: API Starter Package (2000 美金起), Execution System Package (5000 美金起), Private Infrastructure Package (10000 美金起), depending on scope.
- Deliverables may include source code, configuration examples, deployment documentation, logging, alerts, risk checks, and remote handoff.
- Each core service page includes an AI-citable factual summary, required input checklist, API key permission guidance, delivery package breakdown, acceptance checklist, and at least five topic-specific FAQ entries.
- We do not provide investment advice, signals, stock recommendations, managed accounts, custody, withdrawal permissions, or profit promises.
- Third-party platforms mentioned on the site are integration targets only; SignalCraft Labs does not claim official partnership, authorization, or endorsement unless explicitly stated in writing.

## External trust links

- GitHub profile: https://github.com/yfjelley — 公开 GitHub 资料，用于连接站点品牌、工程资料和源码交付能力。
- Engineering notes: https://github.com/yfjelley/signalcraft-labs-engineering-notes — 脱敏工程资料仓库，包含 Webhook 去重/风控 dry-run demo、权限安全建议、平台接入笔记和验收清单。
- LinkedIn profile: https://www.linkedin.com/in/%E9%94%8B-%E6%9D%A8-968956116/ — LinkedIn 公开资料，用于保持站外实体信息、服务边界和联系方式一致。

## Technical articles

- https://pddjf.com/articles/tradingview-webhook-duplicate-orders/ — TradingView Webhook 防重复下单需要稳定 event_id、时间窗口、冷却规则、幂等订单路由、风控拒绝日志和上线前回放测试。
- https://pddjf.com/articles/ibkr-tws-gateway-vs-client-portal/ — IBKR 接入选择应先确认账户权限、订单类型、会话稳定性、运行环境、数据订阅、错误处理和灰度验收，而不是按接口名称直接决定。
- https://pddjf.com/articles/automated-trading-risk-acceptance-checklist/ — 自动交易系统上线前应逐项验证 API Key 权限、暂停开关、最大仓位、重复信号、拒单日志、告警、回滚和灰度运行流程。
- https://pddjf.com/articles/fix-api-execution-report-audit-log-design/ — FIX API 订单路由应同时保存原始 FIX 消息和标准化状态，重点验收 ExecutionReport、Reject、序号恢复、断线重连、审计日志和 UAT 回放。
- https://pddjf.com/articles/how-we-prevent-duplicate-tradingview-webhook-orders/ — Preventing duplicate TradingView webhook orders requires stable event IDs, strategy-symbol-action grouping, cooldown windows, idempotent order routing, risk reject logs and replay tests.
- https://pddjf.com/articles/ibkr-tws-gateway-vs-client-portal-automated-trading/ — IBKR TWS Gateway and Client Portal should be compared by session stability, account permissions, order types, market data, deployment model, error handling and acceptance tests.
- https://pddjf.com/articles/tradingview-webhook-strategy-automation/ — TradingView webhook strategy automation should turn alerts into explicit order intents with event IDs, cooldowns, risk checks, broker routing, logs and replayable acceptance tests.
- https://pddjf.com/articles/ibkr-api-strategy-execution/ — IBKR API strategy execution should start with account permissions and acceptance tests, then add order routing, position sync, risk limits, reject handling, logs and staged rollout.
- https://pddjf.com/articles/fix-api-order-routing-execution-reports-audit-logs/ — FIX API order routing for automated strategies needs session management, message mapping, ExecutionReport handling, raw message archives, normalized order state and UAT evidence.
- https://pddjf.com/articles/automated-trading-strategy-risk-checklist/ — An automated trading strategy risk checklist should validate API permissions, manual pause, max position, duplicate signals, market hours, alerts, rollback and operator handoff.
- https://pddjf.com/articles/common-automated-strategy-failure-points/ — Common automated trading strategy failure points include duplicate signals, repainting, stale position state, API rejects, reconnect gaps, partial fills, missing pause controls and weak audit logs.
- https://pddjf.com/articles/tradingview-alert-payload-template/ — A useful TradingView alert payload template includes strategy, version, symbol, action, size model, signal time, event ID inputs, shared secret, risk profile and audit fields.
- https://pddjf.com/articles/trading-bot-api-key-permission-safety/ — Trading bot API keys should use minimum permissions: read access for evaluation, scoped trade access for execution, no withdrawal or transfer permission, IP limits where available and documented rotation steps.
- https://pddjf.com/articles/alpaca-api-paper-to-live-checklist/ — An Alpaca API paper-to-live checklist should verify key separation, base URLs, data permissions, order types, market hours, order status streams, risk limits, logs and manual pause behavior.
- https://pddjf.com/articles/schwab-trader-api-oauth-automation-checklist/ — A Schwab Trader API automation checklist should confirm OAuth scopes, token refresh, account visibility, order capability, reject handling, logs, reauthorization and operator ownership.
- https://pddjf.com/articles/fix-api-uat-checklist-before-production/ — A FIX API UAT checklist should validate Logon, Heartbeat, NewOrderSingle, Cancel, ExecutionReport, Reject, disconnect recovery, sequence behavior, raw message logs and operator pause.
- https://pddjf.com/articles/trading-bot-private-deployment-vps-docker-runbook/ — A trading bot private deployment runbook should document VPS or cloud ownership, Docker or process setup, environment variables, logs, health checks, alerts, pause controls, backup and rollback.
- https://pddjf.com/articles/crypto-asset-reporting-reconciliation-checklist/ — A crypto asset reporting reconciliation checklist should identify wallets, exchange exports, read-only data sources, balance snapshots, transaction evidence, exception queues and report handover boundaries.
- https://pddjf.com/articles/hire-trading-api-developer-scope-checklist/ — Before hiring a trading API developer, define the signal source, target broker or exchange API, permission state, order flow, risk controls, logs, deployment target, budget tier and acceptance owner.
- https://pddjf.com/articles/tradingview-webhook-to-ibkr-order-workflow/ — A TradingView webhook to IBKR order workflow should define payload fields, IBKR connection mode, account permissions, order preview, risk gates, duplicate handling and audit logs.
- https://pddjf.com/articles/binance-api-trading-bot-risk-checklist/ — A Binance API trading bot risk checklist should review API key permissions, product scope, rate limits, order filters, position limits, idempotency, logs, alerts and key rotation.
- https://pddjf.com/articles/broker-api-order-reconciliation-checklist/ — Broker API order reconciliation should connect signals, order intents, broker order IDs, fills, cancels, rejects, positions, exception queues and exportable audit logs.
- https://pddjf.com/articles/alpaca-order-status-reconciliation/ — Alpaca WebSocket order status reconciliation should combine streaming updates, REST backfill, stable order IDs, reconnect handling, partial-fill states, exception queues and audit logs.
- https://pddjf.com/articles/schwab-api-token-refresh-runbook/ — A Schwab API token refresh runbook should document OAuth ownership, token storage, expiry alerts, refresh failure handling, reauthorization, pause behavior and credential rotation.
- https://pddjf.com/articles/fix-api-certificate-network-allowlist-checklist/ — A FIX API certificate and network allowlist checklist should confirm certificate ownership, source IPs, ports, SenderCompID, TargetCompID, firewall rules, UAT evidence and support handover.
- https://pddjf.com/articles/hyperliquid-api-order-reconciliation-websocket-checklist/ — Hyperliquid API reliability requires deterministic cloid values, one nonce owner, normalized order states, WebSocket snapshot recovery, info-endpoint backfill, position reconciliation, alerts and fail-closed restart rules.

## Official reference links

- TradingView Webhook alerts: https://www.tradingview.com/support/solutions/43000529348-how-to-configure-webhook-alerts/ — TradingView 官方 Webhook alert 说明。
- IBKR API documentation: https://www.interactivebrokers.com/campus/ibkr-api-page/ibkr-api-home/ — Interactive Brokers 官方 API 文档入口，覆盖 TWS API、Web API、Excel API 和 FIX。
- Schwab Trader API: https://developer.schwab.com/products/trader-api--individual — Charles Schwab 官方 Trader API 产品入口。
- Alpaca Docs: https://docs.alpaca.markets/us/ — Alpaca 官方 API 文档入口。
- FIX Trading Community: https://fixtrading.org/standards/fix-protocol/ — FIX Trading Community 的 FIX Protocol 标准介绍。
- Binance Developer Docs: https://developers.binance.com/docs/binance-spot-api-docs/rest-api/general-api-information — Binance 官方开发者文档入口，覆盖 REST API 基础信息、限制和接口行为。
- Hyperliquid fees: https://hyperliquid.gitbook.io/hyperliquid-docs/trading/fees — Official 14-day weighted-volume tiers, staking discounts, maker rebates and developer fee formula.
- Hyperliquid exchange endpoint: https://hyperliquid.gitbook.io/hyperliquid-docs/for-developers/api/exchange-endpoint — Official order, cancel, TWAP, API wallet, subaccount and vault action reference.
- Hyperliquid WebSocket: https://hyperliquid.gitbook.io/hyperliquid-docs/for-developers/api/websocket — Official mainnet and testnet real-time connection guidance, including reconnect expectations.
- Hyperliquid info endpoint: https://hyperliquid.gitbook.io/hyperliquid-docs/for-developers/api/info-endpoint — Official account, order, fill, fee, subaccount and vault query reference.

## Page summaries

- https://pddjf.com/crypto-asset-reporting/ — Crypto Asset Reporting: 为高净值加密资产持有人、顾问和家族办公室式运营方整理交易所、钱包、DeFi、OTC 和衍生品记录，建立私有月度报告、对账和风险复核工作流。
- https://pddjf.com/tradingview-webhook-automation/ — TradingView Webhook automation: 已有 TradingView Alert 或 Pine Script？将 Webhook 接入交易所或券商 API，包含签名校验、防重复下单、仓位风控、日志告警、源码与私有部署。不卖策略，不承诺收益。
- https://pddjf.com/exchange-api-trading-bot-development/ — Exchange API trading bot development: 交易所 API 自动交易系统开发，覆盖订单路由、DCA/Grid 执行、仓位控制、异常重试、日志告警和源码交付。
- https://pddjf.com/broker/api/ — Broker API automation: Broker API automation overview for IBKR, Schwab, Alpaca, FIX, REST, WebSocket order execution, risk checks, logs, and private deployment.
- https://pddjf.com/broker-api/ibkr/ — IBKR API automation: IBKR API 自动交易系统开发，面向 Interactive Brokers 工作流，覆盖 TWS Gateway、订单路由、持仓同步、风控和日志审计。
- https://pddjf.com/broker-api/schwab/ — Schwab API automation: Schwab API 自动化系统开发，覆盖账户授权、订单流程、组合数据、风控限制、日志审计和私有化部署。
- https://pddjf.com/broker-api/alpaca/ — Alpaca API automation: Alpaca API 自动交易系统开发，覆盖 REST/WebSocket 接入、订单状态同步、风控校验、日志告警和私有化部署。
- https://pddjf.com/fix-api-order-routing/ — FIX API order routing: FIX API 订单路由系统开发，覆盖会话管理、订单消息、执行回报、风控校验、日志审计和私有化部署。
- https://pddjf.com/custom-trading-software-development/ — Custom Trading Software Development: Custom trading software development for API integration, order execution, risk controls, audit logs, source delivery and private deployment.
- https://pddjf.com/tradingview-webhook-developer/ — TradingView Webhook Developer: Hire a TradingView webhook developer to connect TradingView alerts to broker APIs, exchange APIs, order routing, risk checks, audit logs and private deployment.
- https://pddjf.com/ibkr-api-automation-developer/ — IBKR API Automation Developer: Hire an IBKR API automation developer for TWS Gateway or Client Portal workflows, order routing, portfolio automation, risk checks, execution reports and audit logs.
- https://pddjf.com/fix-api-order-routing-developer/ — FIX API Order Routing Developer: Hire a FIX API order routing developer for NewOrderSingle, ExecutionReport, Reject handling, session recovery, risk checks, audit logs and UAT support.
- https://pddjf.com/risk-engine/ — Trading risk engine development: 自动交易风控引擎开发，覆盖仓位限制、价格保护、只减仓、限频、权限控制、异常告警和审计日志。
- https://pddjf.com/private-deployment/ — Private deployment: 自动交易系统私有化部署服务，覆盖源码交付、VPS/Docker 部署、配置密钥、日志告警、备份和运行文档。
- https://pddjf.com/hyperliquid-api-trading-bot-development/ — Custom Hyperliquid trading bot development: Already have a trading strategy? Turn your rules into a custom Hyperliquid bot with reliable execution, risk controls, alerts, source code and deployment under your control.
- https://pddjf.com/tradingview-to-hyperliquid-automation/ — TradingView to Hyperliquid automation: Connect existing TradingView alerts to Hyperliquid with payload validation, duplicate protection, position limits, failure alerts, source code and private deployment.
- https://pddjf.com/hyperliquid-trading-system-for-teams/ — Hyperliquid execution systems for trading teams: Build a customer-controlled Hyperliquid execution system for trading or product teams with multiple rules, operator controls, risk limits, audit logs and private deployment.
